channel.title: Entry Level IT on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Entry Level IT on simeononsecurity

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook: From Help Desk to IT Director
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology" , "career playbook" , "IT certifications" , "technology jobs" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salaries, and team leadership.

item.title: Getting Started in Information Technology
item.category: "IT career" , "getting started in IT" , "IT beginner" , "IT career path" , "IT specializations" , "home lab" , "IT training" , "entry level IT"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin an IT career — from understanding the field to building your first home lab and choosing a specialization.
